---
title: "Wald: FLRW Cosmology and Friedmann Equations"
jupyter: julia-1.12
---

# Wald: FLRW Cosmology and Friedmann Equations

This tutorial follows **Robert Wald's *General Relativity* (Chapter 5)**.
We will implement the Friedmann-Lemaître-Robertson-Walker (FLRW) metric
and derive the Friedmann equations.

!!! info "Project Profile for AI Agents (LLM TL;DR)"
    - **Goal**: Implement FLRW metric and derive Friedmann equations.
    - **Reference**: Wald, *General Relativity*, Chapter 5.
    - **Status**: Placeholder.

## 1. Setup

```{julia}
using xAct
using Plots
using LinearAlgebra
```

## 2. Implementation

(Full implementation coming soon)

## Next Steps

- **Carroll**: Review [Schwarzschild Geodesics](carroll_schwarzschild_julia.md).
- **Wave Equations**: See [MTW: Gravitational Waves](mtw_gravitational_waves_julia.md).
